creator: rooneg@electricjellyfish.net
text:
This problem has been fixed.  I submitted a pr shortly after you did (number
25659), and it was resolved yesterday.  Guess I should have checked the pr
database before filing my own ;-)

-- 
garrett rooney                        Unix was not designed to stop you from 
rooneg@electricjellyfish.net          doing stupid things, because that would  
http://electricjellyfish.net/         stop you from doing clever things.
